creator: ports@stdrand.com
text:
Created attachment 155306
Relevant logs

net-mgmt/seafile-gui is segfaulting when trying to run its program (called `seafile-applet`).

It would appear that the segmentation fault is from mismatched linked versions --- seafile-applet is trying to use both libssl.so.8 and libssl.so.7 (note how the backtrace entries 0 and 1 in attached gdb.log link to libssl.so.8 and libssl.so.7, respectively).

Furthermore, neither seafile-gui nor seafile nor ccnet ports can be compiled without `WITH_OPENSSL_PORT`; `pkg-config` cannot find the base OpenSSL.

Attached `sysinfo.txt` contains the relevant system and package versions.

Attachments:
- sysinfo.txt --- system information
- gdb.log --- output from `gdb seafile-applet`
- build.log --- excerpt from (failed) build of seafile-gui
- ccnet.config.log --- config.log from `/usr/ports/net-mgmt/ccnet/work/haiwen-ccnet-1e1aeae/config.log` (mentioned in build.log)
